declarations.name: prop_12
declarations.statement:
theorem prop_12 (n: Nat) (f: α → α) (xs: List α) :
   (List.drop n (List.map f xs) = List.map f (List.drop n xs)) :=

tactic_nodes.tactic_text:
induction xs generalizing n with
| nil => _*_
| cons x xs ih => _*_

input_obligation.goal: List.drop n (List.map f xs) = List.map f (List.drop n xs)

output_obligations.goal: List.drop n (List.map f []) = List.map f (List.drop n [])

hypotheses.name: ih

declarations.name: entangled_reasoning
declarations.statement:
theorem entangled_reasoning
    (A B C D E F : Prop)
    (hab : A → B)
    (hac : A → C)
    (hbde : B → D → E)
    (hcf : C → F)
    (ha : A)
    (hd : D) : (B ∧ E) ∧ (C ∧ F) :=

tactic_nodes.tactic_text: have he : E := hbde hb hd
